Findings.Title: Terraform validate: Missing required argument
Findings.Detail: The argument 'location' is required, but no definition was found.
Findings.Remediation: Fix the Terraform configuration in infra/

Findings.Title: AVD-AZU-0001: Storage account allows public access
Findings.Detail: Storage account is configured to allow public blob access. This may expose sensitive data.
Findings.Remediation: Set allow_blob_public_access to false in the azurerm_storage_account resource.

Findings.Title: AVD-AZU-0027: Network security group allows ingress from 0.0.0.0/0
Findings.Detail: A network security group rule allows ingress from any source (0.0.0.0/0) to a sensitive port.
Findings.Remediation: Restrict the source address prefix to specific IP ranges.

Findings.Title: Terraform validate: Deprecated attribute
Findings.Detail: The attribute 'enable_accelerated_networking' is deprecated. Use 'accelerated_networking_enabled' instead.
Findings.Remediation: Fix the Terraform configuration in network

Findings.Title: AVD-AZU-0050: Key Vault does not have purge protection enabled
Findings.Detail: Azure Key Vault does not have purge protection enabled, which prevents permanent deletion during retention period.
Findings.Remediation: Enable purge protection on the Key Vault resource.
